title: Lemon Puff Pastry Tart
description: A delicious and flaky pastry tart filled with a tangy lemon curd, perfect for a vegetarian dessert or snack.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry and place it in a tart pan.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, zest, sugar, eggs, and flour.
Pour the lemon mixture into the pastry shell.
Dot the top of the lemon mixture with the melted butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Allow the tart to cool completely before serving.
Serve with a dollop of whipped cream, if desired.
Refrigerate leftovers for up to 3 days.
